title: Review: core round 18
notes:
Maintainer risk: HIGH -- nie-43zd.1 is a build-breaking compile error that prevents cargo test from running at all; nie-43zd.2 is a resource-exhaustion DoS on the relay's auth handshake path.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) relay/src/ws.rs was not in scope so the auth handshake timeout (nie-43zd.2) came from cross-reference, not deep relay review; (2) MLS credential validation by openmls internals was not traceable without reading the openmls library source; (3) the age KDF work factor is library-controlled and not verified. Would raise confidence if: the full relay ws.rs was in scope, and if the openmls credential validation path was traced to confirm non-nie credentials cannot cause panics.
